title: Continuous non-destructive imaging simulations for an ultracold 166Er Bose-Einstein condensate
description: Notebook-aligned Version 1 simulation and dissertation figure workflow for continuous non-destructive imaging of an ultracold 166Er Bose-Einstein condensate. This pre-release metadata prepares the repository for a future Zenodo archive; no DOI has been minted yet.
notes: No DOI exists yet. Add DOI and final creator metadata after the first archived Zenodo release.
